task_completion.visual_evidence: The ProjectLibre application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The settings or options dialog is open
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings or options dialog (e.g., 'Options' or 'Project Information') is open within ProjectLibre.

task_completion.description: Hours per day is configured to 10.00
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the settings dialog, the 'Hours per day' (or similar) field is set to 10 or 10.00.

task_completion.description: Hours per week is configured to 40.00
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the settings dialog, the 'Hours per week' (or similar) field is set to 40 or 40.00.

task_completion.description: The project is saved as an XML file to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog is visible showing the directory as 'Projects' (or /home/ga/Projects) and the filename as '10h_day_project.xml'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the ProjectLibre GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking through the ProjectLibre GUI menus (e.g., File -> Options, File -> Save As) rather than using terminal commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually edit the XML file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not open the XML file in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually modify the MinutesPerDay or MinutesPerWeek values.

integrity.description: The file was saved using the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The file is saved using the ProjectLibre 'Save As' dialog, not by moving, copying, or echoing text into a file in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target save path is /home/ga/Projects/10h_day_project.xml. In the ProjectLibre GUI, the agent should configure 'Hours per day' to 10.00 and 'Hours per week' to 40.00. The original project contains 146 tasks, so the saved project should be a genuine ProjectLibre XML file, not a manually created dummy file.
